prompt_used: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You stop the broadcast but lose the array team in shutdown." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
